steps.title: Subtract 2.6 from both sides to isolate x
steps.content:
Start with $2.6 + x = 2.8$. To isolate $x$, subtract 2.6 from both sides:
$$2.6 + x - 2.6 = 2.8 - 2.6$$

steps.title: Simplify both sides
steps.content:
On the left, $2.6 - 2.6 = 0$, leaving just $x$. On the right, calculate \$2.8 - 2.6$:
$$x = 0.2$$
